acceptance_criteria.text: Run a keyboard-only/assistive-technology pass over the app's overlays and menus (including the surfaces added by 210/211) and record findings in an audit.
evidence: Findings: modals didn't trap focus (16 reachable tabbables behind an open dialog), no focus restoration on close, track-switcher menu not keyboard-dismissable

acceptance_criteria.text: Fix the keyboard/AT gaps found and verify them in the live app.
evidence: src/App.tsx: background marked inert while a modal is open; useReturnFocus restores focus to the trigger; track switcher closes on Escape (focus to toggle) and outside click
Verified live: tabbables outside an open dialog 16 -> 0; focus returns to trigger; switcher dismisses via Escape + outside click; no console errors

acceptance_criteria.text: Add regression coverage and keep the checks green.
evidence: scripts/validate-accessibility.mjs: 6 -> 10 tripwire checks (inert background, focus return, switcher dismissal, multi-select checkbox semantics)
Test hygiene: vite.config.ts excludes Tauri build-copied test files under src-tauri/** (true count 56 tests, 3 files)
npm run validate:a11y (10 checks), npm test (56 passed), npm run build all pass

acceptance_criteria.text: A full real-screen-reader (NVDA/VoiceOver) walkthrough of every view and the lesson reader is recorded as the next accessibility pass.
evidence: Out of scope for this overlay/menu iteration; captured as a follow-up in the audit and audits/index.md 'Next Recommended Audit'.
